name: ai-readiness-assessment
description: Self-contained AI readiness assessment for any repo — scan for evidence, ask clarifying questions, place the team across all fourteen dimensions of the Agentic Experience 5-Level Habitat Maturity Model (the spine) and the six-level Sovereign Engineer cognitive ladder, compute the Habitat Build Gap, and produce a timestamped assessment with a gap-anchored reading path through The Sovereign Engineer and a single TechTalk engagement recommendation.
